techcrunch.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
techcrunch.summary: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation

techcrunch.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
techcrunch.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

techcrunch.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
techcrunch.summary: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

techcrunch.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
techcrunch.summary: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

techcrunch.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
techcrunch.summary: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

techcrunch.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
techcrunch.summary: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

techcrunch.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
techcrunch.summary: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

techcrunch.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
techcrunch.summary: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

techcrunch.title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
techcrunch.summary: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
techcrunch.summary: If founders and other business leaders weren't already envious of Dario Amodei, who sits atop one of the world's fastest-growing AI companies, they're going to be seriously envious now.
